title: Adult Out of Home Respite Care - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Adult Out of Home Respite Care 4 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Autism Spectrum Disorder Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF AUTISM SOCIETY OF OREGON AUTISM SPECTRUM DISORDER INFORMATION AND RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on autism resources, respite evenings for caregivers (“Take a Break on ASO”), and autism-friendly community events. 9320 SW Barbur Boulevard Suite 240 Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm Office: Friday 11am-2pm or by appointment Email (503) 636-1676 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BOISE RESCUE MISSION MINISTRIES RESCUE MISSION RECOVERY LODGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a community shelter in addition to community meals. 921 W Corporate Lane Nampa, ID 83651 Eligibility: Shelter: People with medical issues experiencing homelessness and requiring additional support. Meals: Unrestricted Hours: Call for check-in times Breakfast: Monday-Saturday 6:30am and Sunday 7:30am Lunch: Monday-Saturday noon, Sunday 1pm Dinner: 7 days per week 6:30pm Email (208) 343-2389 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTER 50+ RESPITE CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides two programs to serve caregivers and individuals with Alzheimer's disease. Time with Friends is a social program for adults with mild memory loss that encourages participants to make new friends, participate in activities, and enjoy outings into the community. Exercise and music therapy is offered. Among Friends is an adult day respite program. Provides a supportive and safe environment for all participants. Activities are socially engaging, positive, and light-hearted. 2615 Portland Road NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: -Experiencing memory loss or symptoms of Alzheimer's -Able to participate in a structured activity environment -Limited behavioral issues; non-violent, non-combative, managed wandering -Require minimal assistance with eating and respond to verbal cueing -Able to utilize restroom facilities with minimal assistance, respond to verbal cueing, and have managed incontinence -Must be able to eat with minimal cueing, managed incontinence, managed behaviors, and will be able to participate and benefit from the program elements Hours: Among Friends: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday 11am-4pm Time with Friends: Thursday 11am-3pm Email (503) 588-6303 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH WASHBURN PHOENIX PLACE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides respite, residential care, and treatment for adults experiencing emotional and mental health crisis. 725 Washburn Way Klamath Falls, OR 97603 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 883-1030 Get Directions Visit Website More Details AUTISM SOCIETY OF OREGON AUTISM SPECTRUM DISORDER INFORMATION AND RESOURCES CENTER 50+ RESPITE CARE KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH PHOENIX PLACE
